autopilot.description: Run OpenSpec Autopilot through the openspec-autopilot skill and plugin tools.
autopilot.template: Use the `openspec-autopilot` skill. Then call `autopilot_run_next` with no arguments unless the user supplied an explicit OpenSpec change or task scope. Interpret the JSON output, ask only returned blocker questions, follow `nextRecommendedCall` when safe, and do not manually edit automation ledgers or simulate plugin-owned state transitions.
